title: fagara rigida
intro: Fagara rigida, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of plant in the genus Zanthoxylum, which is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Fagara rigida include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Fagara rigida is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its seeds and roots are used in herbal preparations to make capsules or infusions.
